message:
fix: error count includes type:Error events, RS drilldown uses correct handler, OAuth redirects to login on failure, SSE dedup fans out callbacks (#5433)

- Logs dashboard error stat now counts events with type "Error" in
  addition to warnings with error/failed reason (#5428)
- ReplicaSet events in EventStream now use drillToReplicaSet instead
  of incorrectly passing the RS name to drillToDeployment (#5429)
- OAuth callback redirects to login page on token exchange failure
  instead of navigating to the protected destination (#5430)
- SSE in-flight dedup now tracks subscribers and fans out
  onClusterData/onDone callbacks to all concurrent consumers (#5431)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
